## Outcome

Describe the user-visible formatting or editability improvement.

## Evidence

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run demo:compile`
- [ ] `npm run demo:lint`
- [ ] Render/audit checks when export behavior changes
- [ ] `npm run fidelity` when renderer, grouping, or visual rules change
- [ ] Every affected slide inspected at full size
- [ ] No unlicensed fixtures, proprietary templates, secrets, or personal data

List exact reports and any intentional deviations.
